creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to wen from comment #8)

The upcoming release of SAGA GIS 7.3.0 (hopefully in a few days) will have support for graphics/proj version 6.1.0. I have tested a recent trunk version and it builds, installs and runs fine already.

If SAGA GIS 7.3.0 is out, I will submit a PR short-dated.
